prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次分别为约5461名→7789名→5601名→5955名，整体呈波动趋势。2023年出现明显后移（7789名），2024年回升至5601名，2025年又小幅后移至5955名，近两年波动幅度约300–400名，2025年基准位次约5955名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年40人、2023年40人、2024年35人、2025年45人，2026年（招生计划文件）计划55人，较2025年扩招约22.2%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第113名→2023年第107名→2025年第103名→2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；该校2022年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（郑强书记管理受学生批评），但近年未出现重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第63位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录，整体报考心理趋于平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程等直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（2024年高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（2024年高热推荐）、计算机类（2024年推荐）等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与太原理工大学理工类定位契合；宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人，较2025年（65897人）基本持平，竞争压力变化不大；2026年；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，与宁夏回族自治区相邻，属邻省211，对宁夏考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5955名、2026年大幅扩招22.2%（位次数字趋于增大）、学校软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、工科专业热度偏高（竞争加剧）、宁夏考生总数基本持平等因素，扩招效应为主但学校吸引力增强形成对冲。，考虑学校排名上升和工科热度带来的额外竞争压力，小幅上调30名。预测2026年最低位次约6779名，区间6279–7279名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6779名，区间6279–7279名。位次在区间下限（6279名）以内可重点冲刺一档专业（电气、数据科学、自动化、光电）；位次在区间中段（6500–7000名）建议以二档为主（机械类、能源动力、化工、材料），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（7279名）附近建议以三档保底为主（安全工程、土木、测绘等），同时可争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 5461, 7789, 5601, and 5955 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, there was a significant drop (7789), rebounding to 5601 in 2024, and slightly declining to 5955 in 2025, with fluctuations of about 300–400 in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5955. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Ningxia: 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 45 in 2025, and 55 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), an increase of about 22.2% compared to 2025. This significant expansion theoretically eases competition, leading to larger ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings has been steadily rising: 113th in 2021, 107th in 2023, 103rd in 2025, and 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, its reputation during the college entrance examination cycle was slightly negative (due to criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but no major negative incidents have occurred in recent years. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, rated as 'average,' with moderate short video exposure. No significant gaps in admission have been recorded, and the overall application psychology tends to be stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology and Materials Science and Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended in 2024), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended in 2024), and Computer Science (recommended in 2024) continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's focus on science and engineering. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is approximately 66,000, roughly the same as in 2025 (65,897), so competition pressure remains similar. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, adjacent to the Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region, making it a neighboring province's 211 university with some regional appeal to Ningxia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5955, the significant 22.2% expansion in 2026 (leading to larger ranking numbers), the university's steadily rising Shanghai Ranking (increasing attractiveness), high popularity of engineering majors (intensifying competition), and the stable total number of candidates in Ningxia, the expansion effect is dominant but offset by increased attractiveness. Taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the rising ranking and engineering popularity, a slight upward adjustment of 30 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6779, with a range of 6279–7279.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 6779, with a range of 6279–7279. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (6279) can focus on Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Data Science, Automation, Optoelectronics); those in the middle range (6500–7000) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, Energy and Power, Chemical Engineering, Materials) while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper bound (7279) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors (Safety Engineering, Civil Engineering, Surveying, etc.) for safety, while also aiming for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
